name: pi-telegram-tool-status
description_en: Companion extension for pi-telegram (by llblab) — posts a compact live-updating service message listing tools used by the agent during Telegram-originated turns only.
description_zh: pi-telegram (by llblab) 的配套扩展 — 仅在来自 Telegram 的回合期间，发布一个包含代理使用的工具的紧凑实时更新服务消息
